llmResponse.agenda_changes: No formal agenda changes announced during 'Changes to the Agenda' section. Board president stated 'There are none' when asked about changes.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do we have a motion to approve? So moved. Maria. Second, Dennis.

items.intro_words: Started. Let me find my agenda. If we can have a roll call, please.
Trustee McBride. Here. Trustee Marquez. Here. Trustee D. Silico. Here.
So we are on item 4.2, report out on closed session from November 18th.
Welcome, Everybody, to the November 18th Redwood City School Board meeting.
We are on 6.1. Are there any changes to the agenda?
So are there any changes, then? There are none. Is there a motion to approve?
At this point, we do not have any cards for oral communication.
So that brings US to item 9.1, the bond program update.
Bond consent items, item 10. Do we have a motion to approve?
12.1 discussion on COVID 19. Great. Thank you, President Lawson.
So I believe you remember prior to Covid, we were beginning to have conversations with Stanford University
So we're on. 12.3, discussion of board policy 4116.
That was just a discussion item. So we're on consent. Do we have a motion to approve?
Item 14.1, annual developer fee report. Good evening. This report is presented to the board tonight
14.2, second reading and approval of board policy 0415 on equity.
All right, moving right along to report from board members and superintendent.
My Agenda 161 information on San Mateo county investment fund. Any questions or comments?
Correspondence? None, it looks like. Okay. Business, Other business or suggested items for future agenda.
Changes to the board agenda schedule. Okay. So that brings us to the end of our agenda.
With that said, do we have a motion to adjourn?
